title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How has modern life changed the way we form friendships?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two factors have had the greatest impact on how we form friendships today.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how modern life has changed the way we form friendships.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two factors have had the greatest impact.
